title: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Customizable Features

blocks.text: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Customizable Features
The set temperature can be corrected between +1.5°C and -1.5°C. The standard compensation value setting is 0°C.

items.text: While simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the fan ▲ switch, turn the ignition to the ON mode and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
While simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the fan ▲ switch, turn the ignition to the ON mode and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
Turn the ignition to ON mode while simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the fan ▼ switch, and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
Turn the ignition to ON mode while simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the fan ▼ switch, and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
While simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the ON/OFF switch, turn on the ignition ON mode and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
While simultaneously pressing the REC switch and the ON/OFF switch, turn on the ignition ON mode and keep it pressed for 10 seconds.
